faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Maroubra can be influenced by flood risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
